first_run.rationale: The score is identical (8/10) in both evaluations. The identified strengths and primary concerns (AI agent experience, lack of specific Nest.js/testing framework mentions) are also identical. The one new concern raised in the variant, regarding career breadth versus depth, is based on the candidate's technology stack, which was not redacted. This difference is attributable to normal run-to-run variation in the model's output rather than a reaction to the removal of the candidate's name and contact information.
